securityFixed: Stored XSS in _build_dashboard_html(): summary/n/status now html.escape()'d
Added import html + comprehensive escaping to loop.py dashboard template
reliabilityFixed: config_file.py: save_config() logs OSError instead of silent pass
heartbeat.py: 4 silent I/O sites now log specific failure reasons
status.py: status file write failure logs warning with path

prioritizedActions.title: Fix stored XSS in loop.py dashboard HTML
prioritizedActions.impact: Eliminates reflected/stored XSS when iteration summaries contain <script> payloads
actions: Wrap summary with html.escape()
Wrap iteration number n with html.escape(str(...))
Wrap status label with html.escape()
Add import html at module top
prioritizedActions.reasoning: User-controlled iteration summary directly interpolated into HTML without escaping. Attack vector: pi session outputs <script>alert('XSS')</script>.

prioritizedActions.title: Fix 3 DOM XSS vectors in app.js
prioritizedActions.impact: onclick handler injection via worker ID and branch name fields
actions: Audit all onclick= attribute interpolations
Replace with addEventListener + dataset attributes
Apply escapeHtml() to all control-plane interpolations
prioritizedActions.reasoning: Template literals interpolate w.id and branch into onclick handlers. Attacker needs access to loop_manager API.

prioritizedActions.title: Consolidate hardcoded /tmp paths under PI_LOOP_DATA_DIR (CRIT-001)
prioritizedActions.impact: Enables multi-instance deployment and container compatibility
actions: Replace /tmp/infinite-loop-state.json in loop.py HTML dashboard with config-derived path
Replace /tmp/dash.html, /tmp/status.json in help_topics.py examples with $PI_LOOP_DATA_DIR placeholders
Make check_disk_space() accept data-directory argument instead of hardcoding /tmp
Update STATUS_FILE_DEFAULT to consistently use _get_data_dir() fallback
prioritizedActions.reasoning: 5+ locations hardcode /tmp despite PI_LOOP_DATA_DIR env var existing. Breaks container deployments and multi-instance setups.

prioritizedActions.title: Wire mypy to actually fail CI (remove || true)
prioritizedActions.impact: Type errors become visible in CI instead of being ignored
actions: Remove || true suffix from mypy invocations
Fix all mypy errors found after enabling strict mode
prioritizedActions.reasoning: mypy is piped through || true in lint-all and mypy targets, silently ignoring all type errors.

prioritizedActions.title: Add make security target (bandit + safety)
prioritizedActions.impact: Automated security scanning in CI pipeline
actions: Add bandit to requirements-dev.txt
Add safety or pip-audit to requirements-dev.txt
Create make security target
Add security job to CI workflow
prioritizedActions.reasoning: No automated security scanning exists despite the project handling secrets and having addressed CVEs.

prioritizedActions.title: Extract run_loop() Phase 1 — pure function separation
prioritizedActions.impact: Fundamental maintainability improvement for the largest function in the codebase
actions: Extract iteration lifecycle into IterationEngine class
Extract notification dispatch into NotificationDispatcher class
Extract dashboard HTML generation into DashboardBuilder class
Extract convergence detection into ConvergenceDetector class
prioritizedActions.reasoning: run_loop() handles shutdown, git, notifications, error recovery, cooldown, HTML generation, HTTP callbacks, and goal cycling — all in one 300+ line function.

prioritizedActions.title: Encapsulate mutable module-level globals
prioritizedActions.impact: Test isolation and predictable concurrency behavior
actions: Turn _ORIGINAL_* in error_recovery.py into ErrorRecoveryStrategy instance attributes
Parametrize _max_output_chars_global instead of module-level mutation
Consider passing daemon_logger to FileLock constructor
prioritizedActions.reasoning: Mutable globals in 7 modules cause state leaks between tests and unpredictable concurrent access.

prioritizedActions.title: Remove dead code: validate_json_output(), _classify_progress()
prioritizedActions.impact: Reduces maintenance surface and false coverage reporting
actions: Remove validate_json_output() from validation.py
Remove _classify_progress() from loop.py
Verify no imports reference removed functions
prioritizedActions.reasoning: Functions defined but never imported or called anywhere in the codebase.

prioritizedActions.title: SSE reconnect with exponential backoff
prioritizedActions.impact: Reduces server load spike during outages
actions: Replace fixed 5s setTimeout with exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 30s
Add jitter to prevent thundering herd
Reset backoff on successful connection
prioritizedActions.reasoning: Fixed 5s SSE reconnect causes aggressive reconnection storms on server restart.

prioritizedActions.title: Config corruption notification + atomic writes
prioritizedActions.impact: Prevents silent data loss on config write failures
actions: Ensure all config writes use atomic rename pattern (write .tmp, then os.rename)
Add corruption detection on read with automatic backup
Notify on config corruption via existing notification channels
prioritizedActions.reasoning: Config write failures silently lose user settings. Atomic writes prevent partial writes.

prioritizedActions.title: Remove contextlib.suppress usage in heartbeat.py
prioritizedActions.impact: Consistent error logging pattern across the codebase
actions: Replace remaining contextlib.suppress(OSError) with try/except+log patterns
Verify heartbeat.py has zero silent suppress calls
prioritizedActions.reasoning: contextlib.suppress hides errors. All I/O failures should be logged at minimum.

prioritizedActions.title: Handle _heartbeat_age OSError with debug log
actions: In _heartbeat_age(), log at debug level when os.path.getmtime raises OSError
Differentiate FileNotFoundError (expected before first heartbeat) from permission errors
prioritizedActions.reasoning: FileNotFoundError is expected on the first poll cycle; other OSErrors (permissions, broken FS) should be logged.

prioritizedActions.title: Dependabot/Renovate configuration
prioritizedActions.impact: Automated security update PRs for dependencies
actions: Configure Dependabot for pip ecosystem
Set weekly schedule and auto-approve for patch updates
Add version update strategy
prioritizedActions.reasoning: No automated dependency update configuration. FastAPI, uvicorn, pytest dependencies won't get automatic security PRs.

prioritizedActions.title: Split LoopConfig (63 fields) into focused dataclasses
prioritizedActions.impact: Separation of concerns; each config domain independently testable
actions: Create IterationConfig, WorkerConfig, GitConfig, NotificationConfig, ArchiveConfig, SafetyConfig, LoggingConfig
Compose in top-level AppConfig container
Replace private _MISSING_TYPE import with project-level sentinel
prioritizedActions.reasoning: LoopConfig violates SRP with 63 fields across 8 unrelated domains. Private API import may break between Python versions.

prioritizedActions.title: Coverage reporting in CI
prioritizedActions.impact: Visibility into code coverage trends over time
actions: Add --cov-report=xml to pytest invocation in CI
Upload coverage report to Codecov or similar
Add coverage badge to README
prioritizedActions.reasoning: No coverage reporting despite 481 tests across 25+ test files. Hard to identify untested paths.

prioritizedActions.title: Pi binary check in CI
prioritizedActions.impact: Catches pi API changes that break the daemon
actions: Add step to verify pi CLI availability
Run pi --version or --help to validate basic functionality
prioritizedActions.reasoning: A pi API change (removed flag, format change) would silently break the daemon without CI catching it.

prioritizedActions.title: Extract dashboard HTML into standalone module
prioritizedActions.impact: Separation of concerns for dashboard logic
actions: Create pi_loop/dashboard.py
Move _build_dashboard_html to new module
Import from dashboard.py in loop.py
prioritizedActions.reasoning: HTML generation logic embedded in the main loop file. Separating it improves testability and single responsibility.

prioritizedActions.title: Document testing practices in CONTRIBUTING.md
prioritizedActions.impact: New contributors can run and write tests
actions: Document how to run smoke tests (pytest -m smoke)
Document test fixtures from conftest.py
Document coverage expectations
Reference Makefile targets
prioritizedActions.reasoning: No contributor guide despite 25+ test files and 481 tests.

backlogUpdates.details: Changed to In Progress. Silent I/O logging added in 4 modules as partial progress. Remaining: help_topics.py, loop.py, preflight.py, status.py path consolidation.
Stored XSS in _build_dashboard_html() fixed with html.escape(). All user-controlled values escaped.

Partial fix applied. Silent I/O failures in config_file.py, git_utils.py, status.py, heartbeat.py now log warnings. Remaining: server.py web_app /proc reads, loop_manager.py log subsystem, frontend empty catch blocks.
B-017: New finding — dashboard XSS (summarized in B-001). B-018a-d: New findings — silent I/O failures across 4 modules, all fixed.

recommendedFirstTask.title: Fix stored XSS in loop.py dashboard HTML
recommendedFirstTask.reasoning: Critical security vulnerability requiring ~5 minutes. User-controlled iteration summaries directly interpolated into HTML without escaping. Complete.
